allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f''''  count={d[count]} symbols={d[symbols]}''''\) for line in sys.stdin for d in [json.loads\(line\)] if d.get\(''''message''''\)==''''scanner_complete'''']")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('scan_only'\), d.get\('skip_options'\), d.get\('live'\), d.get\('message'\)\)")
